text:
International Naomi Too has been named in the final team that leaves on Tuesday for the Africa beach volleyball Olympic qualifiers in Tetouan, Morocco.The women and men's teams have been going through intensive training at the Flamingo beach hotel in Mombasa.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Beach volleyball team goes hunting for Olympic Games slot
author: Ernest Ndunda
description: Naomi Too is bouncing back to partner with Gaudencia Makokha for the Morocco event .
keywords: ["2024 Paris Olympics","Africa beach volleyball Olympic qualifiers","Naomi Too","Gaudencia Makokha"]
